verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In Your presence, There is fullness of joy, At Your right hand, There are pleasures evermore, You surround us with Your favor, O Lord, The earth is full of Your goodness, The earth is filled with Your love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Exceedingly, abundantly, Far above all we, Could ever ask or think, Exceedingly, abundantly, You give us all things to enjoy.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The earth is full of Your glory, The earth is filled with Your love.
